metadata.title: Haseloff Software Solutions – Your Vision. Our Code.
metadata.description: We build web apps, mobile apps, and custom software. Modern, fast, reliable.

hero.title: Your Vision.
hero.subtitle: We build web apps, mobile apps, and custom software – modern, fast, and to the point.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: Three areas, one goal: software that works

web.title: Web Development
web.description: High-performance web apps with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. From landing pages to complex business applications – we deliver.

app.title: App Development
app.description: Native and cross-platform apps for iOS and Android. Fast, stable, and with a UX that excites.

custom.title: Custom Software
custom.description: Backend systems, APIs, and automations. Tailored to your requirements, no compromises.

philosophy.title: Our Values
philosophy.subtitle: How we work – and why it works

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: No BS. Transparent communication, understandable solutions. Reducing complexity without losing functionality.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Clean code, thoughtful architecture, best practices. Every line of code has a purpose – nothing is accidental.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.description: Data protection, accessibility, sustainable development. Software that's accessible to everyone and stays that way.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Got an idea? We've got the code.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: The protection of your data matters to us. We process your data exclusively on the basis of legal provisions (GDPR, TKG 2003).

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.text: The data controller is Haseloff Software Solutions, Breite Straße 7, 39288 Burg OT Detershagen.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.text: When visiting our website, general information is automatically collected (server log files): browser type, operating system, access time, and similar.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: Our website only uses technically necessary cookies for basic site functions.

contact.title: Contact Form
contact.text: Your data from the contact form is stored by us for processing the inquiry. We will not share this data without your consent.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: You have the right to information, correction, deletion, restriction, data portability, revocation, and objection.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: The questions I get asked most

duration.question: How long does a project take?
duration.answer: Depends! A landing page: 2–3 weeks. A full web app with backend and everything: 2–4 months. Let's chat quickly and I'll give you a realistic estimate.

cost.question: What does it cost?
cost.answer: Honestly: it depends on scope. A clean website starts around €2,500, a proper app can run €15–25k. Sounds like a lot? You're getting professional code that lasts for years. Just tell me what you have in mind.

technologies.question: What tech do you use?
technologies.answer: React & Next.js for websites, React Native for apps, TypeScript everywhere, PostgreSQL for databases. Proven, future-proof, no hype stuff.

maintenance.question: What happens after launch?
maintenance.answer: 3 months of free support. After that, maintenance contracts from €150/month – or just call when something's up. I don't leave anyone alone with broken code.

process.question: How does the process work?
process.answer: Relaxed: Initial chat (free) → Proposal → Design mockups → Development with regular updates. You're always in the loop, no surprises.

support.question: How fast do you reply?
support.answer: Within 24h, usually faster. For emergencies, also by phone. Because waiting days for answers sucks – I do things differently.

contact.title: More questions?
contact.description: Shoot me a message! Consultation is free.
